name: Farmobile Field Data Aggregation API
what_it_does: Farmobile field data aggregation and machine data REST API for capturing, standardizing, and monetizing precision agriculture machine data from all major OEMs (John Deere, CNH, AGCO, CLAAS) for growers, ag retailers, and data buyers. Enables AI agents to manage passive data capture from farm equipment via Farmobile PUC (Passive Uplink Connection) device for universal machine data aggregation, handle as-applied, as-planted, and as-harvested data standardization across equipment brands for multi-OEM farm data normalization, access field operation history and agronomic event data for farm performance analytics automation, retrieve machine performance and equipment utilization data for farm fleet intelligence, manage data consent and grower data licensing for ag data marketplace automation, handle agronomic data sharing with trusted ag retail and agronomic advisors for advisory workflow, access crop insurance documentation data for crop insurance automation, retrieve carbon and sustainability metric from field operation data for ESG farming reporting, manage data buyer API for ag input suppliers, crop insurers, and lenders for data monetization, and integrate Farmobile with farm management platforms, crop insurance systems, and precision ag data marketplaces.
use_cases: Aggregating machine data from multi-OEM farm agents
Standardizing field data from precision ag agents
Documenting operations from crop insurance agents
Monetizing farm data from data marketplace agents
not_for: Farm management information system (use John Deere OC or Trimble Agriculture)
best_when: A grower with mixed-brand equipment, ag data aggregator, crop insurer, or ag input supplier wanting AI agents to automate multi-OEM machine data capture, field operation standardization, crop insurance documentation, and precision agriculture data analysis via Farmobile's hardware-agnostic data platform.
avoid_when: GROWER DATA OWNERSHIP AND CONSENT FOR DATA SHARING: Farmobile's data marketplace requires explicit grower consent for each data buyer relationship; automated data sharing with ag input suppliers, crop insurers, or lenders without grower-specific consent creates unauthorized data access under AFBF Privacy Principles and Farmobile data use policy. GROWER DATA AS LOAN COLLATERAL VALUATION: Automated use of Farmobile farm data by lenders for crop loan collateral valuation must include grower consent and appropriate loan disclosure; automated financial decisions based on Farmobile farm data without borrower consent creates ECOA and fair lending compliance issues. CROP INSURANCE DOCUMENTATION COVERAGE TRIGGER ACCURACY: Automated crop insurance documentation using Farmobile field operation data for prevented planting, replant, or yield loss claims must accurately record application dates, rates, and field boundaries; automated documentation with field boundary or timing errors creates crop insurance claim accuracy issue.

auth.notes: Farmobile uses OAuth 2.0 with scopes. REST API with JSON. Leawood, Kansas HQ. Founded 2014 by Jason Tatge. Private (venture-backed, Trimble Strategic Investment). Farmobile PUC hardware device enables universal machine data capture from any OEM equipment. Ag data marketplace model: growers consent to share data with buyers (input suppliers, insurers, lenders). Multi-OEM data standardization: John Deere, CNH, AGCO, CLAAS, Kubota. Competes with Ag1Source, Climate FieldView, and Conservis for farm data aggregation.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — hardware device (PUC) purchase + data subscription for growers; data buyer API access for commercial buyers
pricing.paid_tiers: Grower: annual PUC device + data subscription per machine; Data buyer: API access subscription by data volume and use case
pricing.notes: Leawood KS. Private (Trimble Strategic Investment). Founded 2014. Hardware + software model. PUC device per machine + annual subscription. Data buyer API separately priced.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; field data and machine telemetry queries throttled; no webhooks — polling required

known_agent_gotchas: NO WEBHOOKS — FIELD DATA EVENTS REQUIRE POLLING: Farmobile does not support native webhooks; automated field operation completion detection, machine data availability, and data consent events require scheduled polling aligned with seasonal farming cadence

GROWER DATA CONSENT SCOPE PER DATA BUYER: Farmobile data marketplace requires grower to explicitly consent to each specific data buyer relationship; automated data sharing pipeline must verify active consent between specific grower and specific data buyer before accessing field data; automated data delivery without consent verification creates Farmobile policy violation and potential AFBF Privacy Principles breach

PUC HARDWARE DEVICE CELLULAR CONNECTIVITY DEPENDENCY: Farmobile PUC hardware device transmits machine data via cellular connection; rural field cellular gaps create data transmission delay or gaps; automated field data workflows must account for PUC transmission lag; real-time field operation data may be delayed by hours in areas with poor cellular coverage

OEM data availability timing vs PUC capture — Farmobile PUC captures data directly from machine CAN bus, not from OEM cloud (John Deere OC, CNH AFS Connect); for equipment without PUC installed, Farmobile has no data; verify PUC hardware installation on each machine before building automation dependent on Farmobile machine data

Data buyer commercial use restriction per consent scope — grower consent for data buyers specifies permitted uses (crop insurance, input recommendations, lending); automated use of Farmobile data for purposes outside consented use scope (resale to unauthorized third parties, undisclosed analytics use) creates Farmobile data use agreement violation

Farmobile Trimble Strategic Investment alignment — Trimble has made strategic investment in Farmobile; Farmobile and Trimble Agriculture (Precision-IQ, xFarm) have data integration relationships; automated workflows spanning Farmobile and Trimble Agriculture platforms must understand data ownership and integration boundaries between the two platforms
agent_readiness.security_notes: Farm data aggregation. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Grower field boundary, machine operation, and crop data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Farm data aggregation. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Grower field data and machine operation records.
